title: IncreaseSlimeRates
description: Makes slimes spawn 2.5x more often in swamps and mangrove swamps.
body:
# IncreaseSlimeRates

This datapack makes slimes spawn 2.5 times more often in swamps and mangrove swamps. It is not able to change the spawning rates of slimes in slime chunks unfortunately.

Note that because the datapack has to fully override worldgen info for swamps and mangrove swamps, it's best to update the datapack
